markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into GrowthX's content creation and review processes.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Human-in-the-Loop Process:** GrowthX's "Atlas" platform uses mandatory human review at key stages (brief, outline, draft) to ensure quality, accuracy, and brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**Fact-Checking Protocol:** For technical content, the AI fact-checks against client-specified sources (e.g., official government sites), and a human editor then manually verifies all links and information.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**High-Volume Production:** The proposed plan is 10 articles/week (net new + refreshes) for Superhuman, double the standard 5/week, to meet the brand's rapid scaling needs.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=2428.0)
  - [**Strategic Partnership:** A 2-phase model starts with an 8-week strategy sprint to build trust and calibrate quality before committing to a 12-month partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

## Topics

### Superhuman's Content Challenge

  - [**Strategic Goal:** Broaden Superhuman's website focus and audience as part of a major rebrand.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [**Key Constraint:** The Grammarly website will be maintained due to its high search equity; the Coda site is under evaluation.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [**Primary Need:** Rapidly scale high-quality content for the main Superhuman site.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=2452.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: The Atlas Workflow

  - [**Function:** An end-to-end partner for SEO/AEO content, acting as an extension of the client's team.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Method:** Combines sophisticated AI workflows in the "Atlas" platform with expert human oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**Core Principle:** Content quality is directly tied to the quality of the inputs ("artifacts") provided by the client.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)

### Human-in-the-Loop Review Process

  - [**Mandatory Human Touchpoints:**](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
      - [**Brief:** Editor validates the AI-generated assignment brief.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
      - [**Outline:** Editor reviews and edits the AI-generated outline.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
      - [**Draft:** Editor performs a deep read and final review.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [**Goal:** Keep final human editing time under 30 minutes per article. If it exceeds this, it signals that the initial inputs (artifacts) need refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

### Fact-Checking for Technical Accuracy

  - [**AI Fact-Checker:** A workflow step that validates content against client-specified, authoritative sources.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [**Human Verification:** An editor manually clicks all links and verifies information to prevent errors, especially for highly technical or compliance-related topics.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Product Accuracy:** The initial strategy sprint builds a "company context" artifact with product details. This artifact is the source of truth, reducing the need for client review over time as trust is established.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

### SEO & AEO Integration

  - [**SEO (Traditional Search):**](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Keyword gap analysis (SEMrush) to find opportunities where competitors rank.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [**Performance:** Weekly/bi-weekly meetings to review metrics (clicks, impressions, conversions) and pivot strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
      - [**Optimization:** Content refreshes (meta titles, content updates) to improve click-through rates.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**AEO/GEO (AI Search):**](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
      - [**Tracking:** Uses Scrunch and LLM referrals in GA4 to monitor AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
      - [**Execution:** Workflows are engineered with GEO best practices (e.g., structured data, clear definitions) to create content favored by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=2061.0)

### Production Timeline & Logistics

  - [**Production Volume:** 10 articles/week for Superhuman (5 net new, 5 refreshes).](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=2428.0)
  - [**Workflow:** Content is delivered for review on a rolling basis throughout the week via Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=2469.0)
  - [**Review Cadence:** A clear, agreed-upon review schedule is critical to prevent publishing bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=2526.0)
  - [**Content Series:** A dedicated workflow pipeline is used to maintain context and ensure consistency while preventing overlap between articles in a series.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=2646.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Superhuman Team:** Debrief internally and decide on the partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=2813.0)
  - [**Jess Mordo:** Contact Tyler Pavlas with the decision or for more information, including on programmatic content.](https://fathom.video/share/YHP7ivQWhJfwE1fQjWVfREujWopiqvoo?tab=summary&timestamp=2813.0)
